bead.title: chore: bump fizeau dep to v0.9.29 in cli/go.mod
bead.description: Update github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau from v0.9.28 to v0.9.29 in cli/go.mod. Run: cd cli && go get github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau@v0.9.29 && go mod tidy. Then rebuild with: make build (or go build -o build/ddx . from cli/). Copy build/ddx to ~/.local/bin/ddx. Restart the ddx server (systemctl --user restart ddx-server).
bead.acceptance: 1. cli/go.mod shows fizeau v0.9.29. 2. cli/go.sum updated accordingly. 3. go build ./... passes in cli/. 4. ddx binary reinstalled to ~/.local/bin/ddx. 5. go version -m ~/.local/bin/ddx shows fizeau v0.9.29.
